also_known_as: ณฉัตร จันทพันธ์
นิกกี้ ณ ฉัตร จันทพันธ์
biography: Nachat Juntapun, nicknamed Nicky, is a Thai singer, actor, model, and host signed under GMMTV. He was one of the five winners of the 2008 contest "LG Starz Talent." He is the older brother of B.O.Y. (Blood of Youth) singer Natcha Juntapun (Mouse).
name: Nachat Juntapun
